messages:
[Unit]
Description=RustClaw Service (start-all-bin with singbox proxy)
After=network.target sing-box.service
Wants=sing-box.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes
User=guagua
Group=guagua
WorkingDirectory=/home/guagua/git_upload

# 使用 singbox 代理
# 如果您的 singbox mixed_port 不是 2080，请修改下面的端口号
# 可以通过查看 singbox 配置文件确认端口，或使用: ss -tlnp | grep sing-box
Environment="HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:2080"
Environment="HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:2080"
Environment="ALL_PROXY=socks5://127.0.0.1:2080"
Environment="http_proxy=http://127.0.0.1:2080"
Environment="https_proxy=http://127.0.0.1:2080"
Environment="all_proxy=socks5://127.0.0.1:2080"

# 保留其他环境变量
Environment="RUSTCLAW_LOG_COLOR=1"

# 执行启动脚本（免配置直接启动，默认使用 release profile）
ExecStart=/bin/bash /home/guagua/git_upload/start-all-bin.sh

# 停止时执行停止脚本
ExecStop=/bin/bash /home/guagua/git_upload/stop-rustclaw.sh

# 重启策略
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=10

# 日志设置
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal
SyslogIdentifier=rustclaw

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

This systemd service manages the RustClaw application by starting it via a script with all network traffic routed through a local sing-box proxy (port 2080), running as the `guagua` user, logging to the system journal, and automatically restarting on failure.

[Unit]
Description=RustClaw Service (start-all-bin with singbox proxy)
After=network.target sing-box.service
Wants=sing-box.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes
User=guagua
Group=guagua
WorkingDirectory=/home/guagua/git_upload

# 使用 singbox 代理
# 如果您的 singbox mixed_port 不是 2080，请修改下面的端口号
# 可以通过查看 singbox 配置文件确认端口，或使用: ss -tlnp | grep sing-box
Environment="HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:2080"
Environment="HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:2080"
Environment="ALL_PROXY=socks5://127.0.0.1:2080"
Environment="http_proxy=http://127.0.0.1:2080"
Environment="https_proxy=http://127.0.0.1:2080"
Environment="all_proxy=socks5://127.0.0.1:2080"

# 保留其他环境变量
Environment="RUSTCLAW_LOG_COLOR=1"

# 执行启动脚本（免配置直接启动，默认使用 release profile）
ExecStart=/bin/bash /home/guagua/git_upload/start-all-bin.sh

# 停止时执行停止脚本
ExecStop=/bin/bash /home/guagua/git_upload/stop-rustclaw.sh

# 重启策略
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=10

# 日志设置
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal
SyslogIdentifier=rustclaw

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

This systemd service manages the RustClaw application by starting it via a script with all network traffic routed through a local sing-box proxy (port 2080), running as the `guagua` user, logging to the system journal, and automatically restarting on failure.
